intro:
reporting and blocking has become the central trust factor in dating apps in 2026. Automated detection misses too many cases, and the consequences — harassment, scams, unsolicited explicit content — genuinely impact users.

Embir has invested in reporting and blocking from day one. Every report is recorded for review; blocking is immediate.

comparisonTable.embir: reporting workflow + reports recorded for review
Immediate permanent ban for severe violations

sections.title: Why reporting and blocking changes everything
sections.content: An algorithm can detect a keyword. It can't understand context, nuance an ambiguous situation, or evaluate if a profile is subtly malicious. Embir's Reporting and blocking workflow examines these cases with judgment. every report is recorded and the reporting user can block immediately.
highlights: Every report recorded for review; blocking is immediate

verdict: If safety and trust are your top priorities in a dating app, Embir is the best choice in 2026: reporting and blocking tools, selfie verification, and zero tolerance for harassment.
ctaText: Safety through reporting and blocking — join Embir

faq.q: How does Embir's reporting and blocking work?
faq.a: Every report is recorded for review; blocking is immediate. For severe violations (harassment, unsolicited explicit content, scams), the ban is immediate and permanent.

faq.q: How long to process a report?
faq.a: No response time is guaranteed. Blocking is immediate for the reporting member.

faq.q: Is moderation available to all users?
faq.a: Yes. reporting and blocking applies to all users regardless of subscription level. Safety isn't a premium feature.
